questions.question_text: Answer the following questions 5*4=20 CO a Differentiate between embedded systems and General-purpose computers w.r.t Processor, IDE, OS, Efficiency, functionality etc. b How do you select the Processor for embedded systems and what are the merits and dementias of RISC and CISC architectures c Explain the architecture of Hard real time and Soft real time systems and how are they differ? d WAP for implementing embedded system for any application [Make your assumptions of the application] and draw its architecture?
How do you Select the IDE for ESD and Explain the different components of the same with sample input and output code? Why do you need H/W-S/W Partitioning and explain?
What is H/W –S/W co-design, explain different components of it along with its architecture with neat diagram? What are the merits and demerits of H/W –S/W co-design?
Explain ARM instruction set with any five addressing modes along with Assembly Code? WAP to implement Software interrupt of ARM Processor and its Interrupt Service Routines with an example code
Explain the Atom processors architecture and how it is suitable for embedded applications? Differentiate salient features of Atom and ARM Processors
WAP to implement any interrupt of the ARM processor w.r.t RTOS? Explain how interrupts are handled in RTOS with neat diagram?

Explain any ARM’s Cortex series processor architecture, its Register set and its pipeline mechanism What is ARMS programming model and explain the same with nest diagram and sample code for any application
Explain the Performance analysis of ESD w.r.t Optimization, speed, Power consumption, System Reliability, Safety and Security in detail and how do you improve the reliability of the system
Explain various testing and debugging techniques of embedded systems What is emulation and simulation and what are its merits and demerits
